details: release no longer uses one reusable service tag
script does not move existing tags
script does not replace assets in an existing release
every workflow run creates a new GitHub Release
dt_setup.exe is attached to the release
DISMTools.zip is created from bin Debug and attached to the release
SHA256SUMS.txt is saved to workflow artifact and hashes are shown in release notes
notes include hashes build details assets and git log changes
release assets are uploaded as workflow artifact release-assets
workflow dispatch supports stable preview prerelease and draft
